name: Interstellar
description: A team of astronauts travel through a wormhole to find a new home for humanity.

name: Inception
description: A thief enters dreams to steal secrets and faces a final impossible mission.

name: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who brings chaos to Gotham City.

name: John Wick
description: A retired assassin seeks revenge after losing everything important to him.

name: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two imprisoned men build friendship while surviving in harsh prison conditions.

name: Forrest Gump
description: The life journey of a simple man who unknowingly influences major historical events.

name: The Conjuring
description: Paranormal investigators help a family experiencing terrifying supernatural events.

name: Insidious
description: A family tries to save their son trapped in a dark spiritual dimension.

name: Toy Story
description: Toys come alive and go through adventures when humans are not around.

name: Frozen
description: Two sisters struggle with magical ice powers that threaten their kingdom.

name: The Hangover
description: A bachelor party in Las Vegas goes wildly wrong after a night of chaos.

name: 3 Idiots
description: Three engineering students challenge traditional education systems with humor and friendship.

name: Shutter Island
description: A U.S. marshal investigates a mysterious disappearance in a psychiatric facility.

name: Gone Girl
description: A man becomes the prime suspect after his wife mysteriously disappears.

name: Titanic
description: A love story unfolds aboard the ill-fated Titanic ship.

name: The Notebook
description: A timeless love story between two people from different social backgrounds.

name: The Da Vinci Code
description: A symbologist uncovers a secret hidden in famous artworks and religious history.

name: Sherlock Holmes
description: A brilliant detective solves complex crimes using logic and observation.

name: The Lord of the Rings
description: A hobbit embarks on a journey to destroy a powerful ring.

name: Pirates of the Caribbean
description: A pirate captain searches for treasure while facing curses and enemies.
